title: Locations
description: Use this page to find location details, visitor information and contacts for Sandia sites and offices.
text:
A national and international presence
Sandia National Laboratories has major sites in Albuquerque, New Mexico, and Livermore, California, with additional facilities and offices across the United States. Sandia also supports research collaborations with partners around the world.
Together, Sandia’s labs, remote testing sites, on-site teams and high-performance computing resources support mission work for the Department of Energy and the National Nuclear Security Administration, including stockpile stewardship, nonproliferation and other national security priorities.
